# `microsoft` — microsoft templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 6

Phishing templates impersonating Microsoft products and services

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Microsoft Account Suspicious Sign-In | [`microsoft_security.html`](microsoft_security.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |

## Template details

### Microsoft Account Suspicious Sign-In

- **File:** [`microsoft_security.html`](microsoft_security.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/microsoft_education.html`](education/microsoft_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Microsoft account: Unusual sign-in activity
  - Action required: Review recent sign-in from Bogotá, Colombia
  - Security alert: Unrecognized device accessed your Microsoft account
- **Operator notes:** Use {{.Date}} for current date realism. The specific location (Bogotá) adds believability. Works across all Microsoft 365 users.

### SharePoint – Document Shared

- **File:** [`sharepoint_document_share.html`](sharepoint_document_share.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.From}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/microsoft_education.html`](education/microsoft_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - A document has been shared with you
  - {{.FirstName}}, a file was shared with you on SharePoint
  - "Q3 Budget" has been shared with you
- **Operator notes:** Shared-document lure is among the highest-clicking Microsoft scenarios. Universal across Microsoft 365 orgs.

### Microsoft 365 – Password Expiration

- **File:** [`microsoft365_password_expiry.html`](microsoft365_password_expiry.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.From}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/microsoft_education.html`](education/microsoft_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your Microsoft 365 password expires today
  - Action required: your password is about to expire
  - Keep your Microsoft 365 password to avoid sign-out
- **Operator notes:** Password-expiry for the Microsoft category. Pairs with the suspicious-sign-in template for a multi-touch sequence.

### Microsoft Teams Direct Message Alert

- **File:** [`microsoft_teams_invite.html`](microsoft_teams_invite.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/microsoft_education.html`](education/microsoft_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Microsoft Teams: Missed chat or workspace invitation
  - You have a pending notification in Teams from Project Manager
  - [Teams] Project Manager sent you a direct message
- **Operator notes:** Impersonates a missed call or message in Microsoft Teams to drive clicks.

### Microsoft OneDrive File Share Notification

- **File:** [`onedrive_file_share.html`](onedrive_file_share.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/microsoft_education.html`](education/microsoft_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - OneDrive: Admin Portal shared Q3_Budget_and_Compensation_Reviews.xlsx with you
  - Document Shared: Q3 Budget and Compensation Reviews
  - Microsoft OneDrive: Access shared excel file
- **Operator notes:** Exploits greed and curiosity by pretending to share a sensitive salary and budget Excel sheet.

### Microsoft 365 MFA Re-enrollment Notification

- **File:** [`microsoft_mfa_update.html`](microsoft_mfa_update.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.From}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/microsoft_education.html`](education/microsoft_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Set up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for Microsoft 365
  - Microsoft 365 Security: MFA registration and device update pending
  - Urgent Notice: Re-enroll in Multi-Factor Authentication
- **Operator notes:** Simulates organization policy updates requiring users to update or re-enroll their authentication settings.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
